notes: When AGENT_MODE=true or UI_CONFIGURATION_DISABLED=true, Arcane manages non-internal settings through environment variables more broadly than the always-on envOverride path.
The settingEnvOverrides section includes stable envOverride settings plus non-internal settings that are env-managed in env-only modes.

envConfig.description: Auto-login credentials (used only when built with the buildables tag + autologin feature flag).

OidcRoleMappings declaratively defines OIDC group→role mappings as a JSON array of role.OidcRoleMappingSpec. Reconciled into source='env' rows on every boot; rows are read-only at runtime. Supports *_FILE for Docker secrets. Leave empty to manage mappings purely via the UI/API.
Timezone for cron job scheduling. Uses IANA timezone names (e.g., "America/New_York", "Europe/London"). "Local" uses the system's local timezone, "UTC" for Coordinated Universal Time.

settingEnvOverrides.description: How often to check container health (cron expression)
settingEnvOverrides.requires: AGENT_MODE=true or UI_CONFIGURATION_DISABLED=true to manage this setting via env. AUTO_HEAL_ENABLED=true to have effect at runtime.

settingEnvOverrides.description: How often to check environment connectivity (cron expression)
settingEnvOverrides.requires: AGENT_MODE=true or UI_CONFIGURATION_DISABLED=true to manage this setting via env.

settingEnvOverrides.description: How often to delete expired and old revoked sessions (cron expression)
settingEnvOverrides.requires: AGENT_MODE=true or UI_CONFIGURATION_DISABLED=true to manage this setting via env.

settingEnvOverrides.description: Maximum completed Activity Center entries to keep per environment. Set 0 to disable count-based cleanup.

settingEnvOverrides.description: Delete completed Activity Center entries older than this many days. Set 0 to disable age-based cleanup.

Override OIDC device authorization endpoint for CLI authentication
Enable OpenID Connect (OIDC) authentication
Claim name to read group memberships from for role mapping (default: groups)
OIDC provider issuer URL
Override OIDC JWKS endpoint
Allow OIDC logins to merge with existing accounts by email
Comma-separated allowlist of native app redirect URIs (e.g., arcane-mobile://oidc-callback)
Custom logo URL for the OIDC provider
Custom name for the OIDC provider (e.g., Authentik, Keycloak)
OIDC scopes to request
Skip TLS verification for OIDC provider
Override OIDC token endpoint

Root directory for manual build workspaces
Default build provider (local or depot)

settingEnvOverrides.description: Configure where swarm stack source files are stored
Configure where local compose template folders are discovered
Minutes a volume-browser helper container may sit idle before automatic removal (default: 10
settingEnvOverrides.requires: AGENT_MODE=true or UI_CONFIGURATION_DISABLED=true to manage this setting via env.

settingEnvOverrides.description: Default container image used to run GitOps pre-deploy lifecycle scripts when a sync does not override it
Allow GitOps syncs to configure pre-deploy lifecycle scripts. Disabled by default because scripts are repo-trusted code that runs on every deploy
Maximum allowed timeout for lifecycle scripts in seconds (default: 300)
Maximum number of concurrent Trivy scan containers for manual and scheduled scans. Minimum 1
Trivy configuration file content in YAML format
settingEnvOverrides.requires: AGENT_MODE=true or UI_CONFIGURATION_DISABLED=true to manage this setting via env.

settingEnvOverrides.description: Maximum CPU cores for Trivy scan containers (supports decimals, e.g. 1.5). Set 0 to disable CPU limit
Trivy ignore file content - one vulnerability ID per line
settingEnvOverrides.requires: AGENT_MODE=true or UI_CONFIGURATION_DISABLED=true to manage this setting via env.

settingEnvOverrides.description: Only report vulnerabilities that have a known fix available. Reduces noise from vulnerabilities you cannot act on.
Override the Arcane tools image used to run Trivy vulnerability scans
settingEnvOverrides.requires: AGENT_MODE=true or UI_CONFIGURATION_DISABLED=true to manage this setting via env.

settingEnvOverrides.description: Maximum memory for Trivy scan containers in MB. Set 0 to disable memory limit
Docker network mode/network name used for Trivy scan containers. Leave empty to inherit Arcane's network automatically.
Keep the Trivy cache volume when unused volumes are pruned manually or on a schedule
Run Trivy scan containers in privileged mode when required by the host security policy
Enable CPU and memory limits for Trivy scan containers
Docker security options applied to Trivy scan containers. Use commas or new lines to separate entries (for example: label=disable)
Scan against a remote Trivy server instead of downloading the vulnerability database locally. Recommended for 32-bit hosts (arm/v7) where the local DB cannot be memory-mapped.
Optional authentication token sent to the remote Trivy server. Leave empty if the server requires no token.
URL of the remote Trivy server (e.g. http://trivy.example.com:4954). Used when client/server mode is enabled.
Enable scheduled vulnerability scanning of all Docker images
settingEnvOverrides.requires: AGENT_MODE=true or UI_CONFIGURATION_DISABLED=true to manage this setting via env.

settingEnvOverrides.description: How often to run scheduled vulnerability scans (cron expression)
settingEnvOverrides.requires: AGENT_MODE=true or UI_CONFIGURATION_DISABLED=true to manage this setting via env. VULNERABILITY_SCAN_ENABLED=true to have effect at runtime.

settingEnvOverrides.description: Timeout for Docker list operations in seconds (default: 30)
Timeout for Docker image pulls in seconds (default: 600 = 10 minutes)
Timeout for Git clone/fetch operations in seconds (default: 300 = 5 minutes)
Default timeout for HTTP requests in seconds (default: 30)
Timeout for proxied requests in seconds (default: 60)
Timeout for container registry operations in seconds (default: 30)
Timeout for Trivy image scans in seconds (default: 900 = 15 minutes)
